name: Gin Rummy 3D Premium
short_description: Enjoy exciting Gin Rummy matches! This high-quality 3D version brings the popular game Gin Rummy on your PC. You can play in Singleplayer offline or LAN and Online Mode! The full animated Tutorial explains rules of Gin Rummy step by step.
detailed_description:
Realistic 3D Gin Rummy simulation with singleplayer, multiplayer and tutorial. With configurable AI strength and many adjustable rule and game variants you can start exciting Gin Rummy tournaments - or just play for fun.

Compete with tricky computer opponents, or play relaxing rounds with friends or family in online mode!

Game environment, cards, rule variants and much more can be customized! For beginners, there is an animated tutorial in which Gin Rummy is explained step-by-step with all the rules.

Features:

  • Singleplayer mode with configurable opponent
  • Multiplayer mode with LAN or Online mode
  • High Quality full animated 3D graphics
  • Lots of tables, rooms and decks
  • High-performance A.I.: different levels of difficulty
  • Voice output and sound
  • Highscore lists
  • HD widescreen output
  • Tutorial, detailed game instructions and help

Note for Linux and Steam Deck users:

To run the game correctly on Linux or Steam Deck, make sure to enable "Force Proton" in the compatibility settings.
